title: Coin Master
notes:
Thanks for playing Coin Master!

In this version, we’ve implemented bug fixes & performance improvements.

We have also implemented our new reward calendar feature - collect your daily rewards! 

Enjoy a world of fun, thrills, and huge rewards right at your fingertips. 

Invite your friends to play Coin Master & get your FREE REWARDS! We also recommend joining our community on Facebook, X, and Instagram for more fun & excitement.

Enjoying Coin Master? Leave a review :)

title: Candy Crush Saga
notes:
Hoppas att du gillar att spela Candy Crush Saga! 

Varje vecka uppdaterar vi spelet med nya inslag, spännande nivåer och viktiga buggfixar som gör spelupplevelsen ännu smidigare. 

Glöm inte att ladda ner den senaste versionen för att få den bästa upplevelsen!

Första gången du spelar? Var inte blyg, det är bara att sätta igång!

title: Quizkampen.
notes:
Vi jobbar ständigt på att förbättra appen – se därför till att uppdatera till senaste versionen för fler nivåer och maxad quizglädje!

Första gången här? Gör som miljoner andra quizälskare och upptäck glädjen i Quizkampen!

title: Animals & Coins Adventure Game
notes:
What's New

- New content and fresh fun are here — jump in and see what's waiting!
- Exciting new promos packed with rewards to grab along the way.
- Bug fixes and performance polish to keep the good times rolling.

Follow us:
https://www.facebook.com/AnimalsandCoins

title: Truck Star Match
notes:
Redo för en spännande uppdatering?

- 200 nya nivåer tillagda, spännande utmaningar väntar!
- Reparera och modifiera de helt nya truckarna PowerBull-ATX och Azure Blade.
- Det nya tidsbegränsade modifieringsevenemanget Frosty Fusion är live och erbjuder fantastiska belöningar som du inte får missa!
- Optimerad topplistafunktion, fler tävlingar väntar på din utmaning!

Upptäck mer spännande innehåll! Uppdatera nu och upplev det på nära håll!

title: Family Island — Farming game
notes:
Hey Islanders!
We're always improving Family Island! This update includes bug fixes, performance enhancements, and a whole lot of love to make your island life even better.
Explore, adventure, and win amazing rewards!
Want to share the fun? Invite your friends to play and get FREE REWARDS! Join our community on Facebook and Instagram for more fun.
Loving Family Island? Leave a review!

title: Top Heroes: Kingdom Saga
notes: Ny uppdatering! Auto-utmaning i Hedersprovet, säsongförhandsgranskning, språkrankning borttagen i Hopp, förenklat läge optimerat!

title: eFootball™
notes:
■ Updates and Additions
・ Updated the game icon.
・ Updated various in-game data.

Fixes for various other issues were also applied in this update.
Check out the News section in-game for further details.

title: Pokémon TCG Pocket
notes:
● New Pulsing Aura booster packs are now available.
● Gold frames have been added to flair.
● A Claim All feature has been added for packs.
● Updates to the Obtain Items feature.
● A 2D pattern code feature has been added for friend requests.
● Revisions have been made to some features.

title: Triple Match 3D
notes: Our latest update is here, packed with new features and enhancements to elevate your travel experience. We've introduced even more stunning destinations to explore, along with special UI improvements that make your experience smoother than ever. Get ready to pack your bags and embark on your next adventure with us!

title: Bingo Voyage: Live Bingo Games
notes:
Thank you for being part of our amazing community! We are dedicated to bringing you the #1 gaming experience, and this update is no exception.

Update now to enjoy: 
• Fresh in-game events and rewards
• A smoother, bug-free experience
• Exciting new improvements and surprises

Ready to play? Let’s go! Don't forget to leave us a review—we love hearing from you!

title: Dream League Soccer 2026
notes:
It’s our Summer Spotlight update!
•Dynamic Stars – Collect Special Players, upgrading live with national team performances. Coming Soon! 
•New Facility – Upgrade your Fanzone for Clan bonuses and Stadium discounts. 
•International Football – Play our brand new “World Tournament” Event type. 
•Manager Accessories – Take control in style with North American themed items. 
•Clan Improvements – Communicate with new interactions and emoji reactions.

title: Foundation: Galactic Frontier
notes:
Update Highlights:
1. Optimized the duration of the Sacred Tribute Vessel, which is now set to 3 hours.
2. Improved the display of Guild Chest information by removing portrait frames.
3. Other optimizations and bug fixes.
